failure_reason: Added a physical Android/Mac mesh-learning receipt and Form-native routing floor. android-mesh-learning returns 4095 with fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way and 1 ok, 0 divergent; fourth-arm-gate returns PASS-4WAY. The adb receipt launches Coherence Sense on SM-S918U1 Android 16 arm64-v8a, records safe capability/liveness summaries with the app running, 39 hardware sensors, camera, microphone, GPS, WiFi, Bluetooth LE, NFC, Vulkan compute, and Mac witness liveness. Routes are native-first for summarize/code-lower/tool-select/distill-retire and native-first-sample-oracle for speech/vision/multimodal. The attempted full-suite aggregate validate was externally SIGTERM-terminated while run_one_indexed child jobs were active, so no full-suite pass is claimed.
